title: Formula
text: If you have two complex numbers $$z_1=r_1\operatorname{cis}(\theta_1)$$ and $$z_2=r_2\operatorname{cis}(\theta_2)$$, $$then$$ $$z_1z_2=r_1r_2\operatorname{cis}(\theta_1+\theta_2).$$

title: Applying the formula
text: $$r_1=4$$, $$r_2=2$$, $$\theta_1=\frac{\pi}{2}$$, and $$\theta_2=\frac{\pi}{4}$$. Plug these into the formula above!

title: Simplifying
text: We have $$8\left(cos\left(\frac{3\pi}{4}\right)+\operatorname{isin}\left(\frac{3\pi}{4}\right)\right)$$ after plugging in. Evaluate the trigonometric functions and distribute for your final answer!
